headline: Reported Earlier, PSA Singapore Taps Motorola Solutions' Advanced TETRA Communications To Coordinate Complex 24/7 Port Operations Across 600 Ports, Facilitating 40M TEU Annually

raw.headline: Reported Earlier, PSA Singapore Taps Motorola Solutions' Advanced TETRA Communications To Coordinate Complex 24/7 Port Operations Across 600 Ports, Facilitating 40M TEU Annually

headline: PSA Singapore Strengthens Global Maritime Leadership with Motorola Solutions’ Technology
summary: SINGAPORE, April 16, 2026--PSA Singapore has chosen Motorola Solutions’ (NYSE: MSI) advanced TETRA digital radio communications to strengthen safety and efficiency across its operations while supporting its ongoing expansion through the Tuas Mega Port project.
